message:
feat(demo): add mouse interactions to Notifications and Performance screens

Notifications: click instructions panel to trigger toasts (positional),
click notification panel to dismiss all, scroll up/down to push toasts.

Performance: click list panel to select item, scroll up/down to navigate
through virtualized list (3 items per scroll tick).

Both screens: added Cell<Rect> area caching, handle_mouse methods,
updated keybindings with Click/Scroll entries, and 8 new tests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
